assertions.assertion: Identifies the missing X-CSRF: 1 header as the root cause
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 7 explicitly states 'Missing X-CSRF: 1 header in SPA fetch calls -- BFF returns 401'

assertions.assertion: Provides a fetch wrapper or interceptor that adds the X-CSRF: 1 header automatically
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 7 provides a complete bffFetch wrapper that adds X-CSRF: 1

assertions.assertion: Shows 401 response handling that redirects to /bff/login
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 7 shows centralized 401 handling with window.location.href = '/bff/login?returnUrl=...'

assertions.assertion: Mentions that /bff/login and /bff/logout must be browser navigations (window.location.href), not fetch calls
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 7 explicitly states 'Login and logout are browser navigations, not fetch calls'
